title: Kadhal endru kavidhai Sonnaal Lyrics Marumunai Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Kadhal Endru
Singer(s): Velmurugan
Movie: Marumunai
Music: Sathya Dev

Kadhal endru kavidhai sonnaal
ulagam rasikkudhu.
kadhalikkum kadhaya sonna
adichi virattudhu.

Kadhal endru kavidhai sonnaal
ulagam rasikkudhu.
kadhalikkum kadhaya sonna
adichi virattudhu.

Yettalavil mattum thaanga kadhal jeyikidhu
veetalavil etti paarthaa oorum eriyudhu
anjarivu mirugam kooda kadhal kolludhu
aararivu manidhan yeno anbai kolludhu

vaai kiliya pesuvorgal vesam poduraar
naayai kooda saadhi paarthu serthu vaikiraar
naayai kooda saadhi paarthu serthu vaikiraar

Munnor sonna pagutharivu
artham palaruku puriyala.
pariyava sonna anbin
kuralum kadhil vilugala.

Saadhi pitham thazhaiku yeri
nidhiyin artham theriyala.
Mathavana enni vazhndhu
pethava manasa kannikala.

Gouravam endra kaanal neeril
karanji pogudhu pinjigal.
kedu ketta manidhan nenjil
ethanai kodi nanjugal.

Arthamulla indhu madham
kannadhasan eludhinaar.
artham purindhu yaaru ingae
anbil vazha palaginaar.

Ulaikalavu kolai thaandi
kaadhal kodum paavama.
thalai kavidhai kadhal enbadhu
vazhkayil perum saabamaa.

Thandavazha inaiserndhaal
rail adhanmel odudhu.
thandavaalam vambu serndhaal
rail udalmel yerudhu.

paalukku kooda kalapasuvai
thaedi thaedi vangudhu
vazhvukku yengum kalapuravai
thaedi poi kolludhu.

Kasum kasum kadhal kondaal
nade vandhu vazhthudhu.
yezhai veetil kadhal vandhaal
dheivamum yamanai maarudhu.

Kadhal endru kavidhai sonnaal
ulagam rasikkudhu.
kadhalikkum kadhaya sonna
adichi virattudhu.

Yettalavil mattum thaanga kadhal jeyikidhu
veetalavil etti paarthaa oorum eriyudhu
anjarivu mirugam kooda kadhal kolludhu
aararivu manidhan yeno anbai kolludhu

vaai kiliya pesuvorgal vesam poduraar
naayai kooda saadhi paarthu serthu vaikiraar
naayai kooda saadhi paarthu serthu vaikiraar

Kadhal endru kavidhai sonnaal
ulagam rasikkudhu.
kadhalikkum kadhaya sonna
adichi virattudhu.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Kadhal Endru Kavidhai Sonnaal?

The song explores themes of love and longing, capturing the emotional highs and lows of romantic relationships.

Who composed the music for Marumunai?

The music for Marumunai was composed by Sathya Dev.

Who is the singer of Kadhal Endru Kavidhai Sonnaal?

The song is sung by Velmurugan, known for his expressive vocal style.

When was the movie Marumunai released?

The movie Marumunai was released in 2014.
enrichedMetadata.summary: Kadhal Endru Kavidhai Sonnaal is a poignant song from the movie Marumunai, expressing the complexities of love through its evocative lyrics. Velmurugan's heartfelt rendition brings out the emotional depth of the song, while Sathya Dev's music adds a layer of melancholy and romance. The song reflects on the joys and pains of love, making it relatable to anyone who has experienced the highs and lows of a relationship. Its soothing melody and touching lyrics make it a perfect choice for moments of reflection and emotional connection.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Kadhal Endru Kavidhai Sonnaal from the movie Marumunai is a captivating melody that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. Velmurugan's soulful voice combined with Sathya Dev's enchanting music creates an unforgettable experience. Dive into this romantic journey and feel the emotions resonate with every note.
stanzaMeanings: When you call it love, the world enjoys it. But when you tell a story of love, it gets rejected.
When you call it love, the world enjoys it. But when you tell a story of love, it gets rejected.
Love wins only to a certain extent. When you look closely, it burns everything. Even an ignorant animal can love, but a wise human somehow destroys love.
People who speak sweetly are pretending. They even choose dogs based on caste and keep them together.
What the elders said about equality, many did not understand. Even the voice of love is not heard by many.
The madness of caste rises, and the meaning of treasure is not known. Living by counting others, the heart becomes blind.
The pride of honor disappears like a mirage. In the hearts of wicked people, there are countless poisons.
Kannadasan wrote meaningful Hindu songs. But who here understood and lived with love?
Love that crosses boundaries is a great sin. The poetry of love in life is a big curse.
When the tracks are clear, the train runs smoothly. When there is trouble, the train derails.
Even for milk, they search for adulteration. In life, they seek deceit and end up losing.
If love comes with money, it is celebrated. If love comes to a poor home, even God changes fate.
When you call it love, the world enjoys it. But when you tell a story of love, it gets rejected.
Love wins only to a certain extent. When you look closely, it burns everything. Even an ignorant animal can love, but a wise human somehow destroys love.
People who speak sweetly are pretending. They even choose dogs based on caste and keep them together.
When you call it love, the world enjoys it. But when you tell a story of love, it gets rejected.
